title: Hiring Store Manager at Burger King India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Burger King India
jsonLd.description:
Burger King India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Hyderabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Burger King India:
Burger King India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Burger King India!
